name: AFFILIATED MANAGERS GROUP, INC.
summary: Overview AMG is a strategic partner to leading independent investment firms globally. Our strategy is to generate long-term value by investing in high-quality independent partner-owned firms, which we refer to as Affiliates, through a proven partnership approach, and allocating resources across our unique opportunity set to the areas of highest growth and return.
